/usr/bin/clang++ --target=aarch64-none-elf -ffreestanding -nostdlib -mcpu=cortex-a72 -Wall -Wextra -Werror -fno-stack-protector -mstrict-align -fno-pie -Wno-unused-command-line-argument -fno-exceptions -fno-rtti -fno-threadsafe-statics -fno-use-cxa-atexit -O3 -DNDEBUG -nostdlib -static --ld-path=/opt/homebrew/bin/aarch64-elf-ld -nostdlib -static -T /Users/stephen/git/viperdos/user/user.ld CMakeFiles/vinit.sys.dir/vinit/vinit.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/vinit.sys.dir/vinit/io.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/vinit.sys.dir/vinit/readline.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/vinit.sys.dir/vinit/cmd_system.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/vinit.sys.dir/vinit/cmd_fs.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/vinit.sys.dir/vinit/cmd_misc.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/vinit.sys.dir/vinit/shell.cpp.obj -o ../vinit.sys  ../lib/libviperlibc.a ../libvipertls.a ../lib/libviperlibc.a
